titleStmt.title: SII 27.161: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 161. (A.R. No. 340 of 1931-32.) SIMANTŪRU, MANGALORE TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab (No. 2) set up in the Janārdhanasvāmin temple.
This is dated Śaka [1435], Āṅgirasa, other details being lost. The year corresponds to 1512-13 A.D., the Śaka year being current.

The record which is badly damaged seems to register a political agreement between Tirumalarāya-chavuṭa, Kunda-heggaḍe and the karaṇikaheggaḍe of Tirumalarasa, to cease all acts of hostility against one another and to jointly encounter the invading forces of Bhayirarasa in case of attack. It refers to Ratṇappa-voḍeya as governing Maṅgalūru-Bārakūru-rājya at the instance of Timma • • daṇṇāyaka.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī gaṇādhipatayēṁ namaḥ . namastuṁga śiraścaṁbi caṁdracāmara cāravē .
trayilōkya nagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē
daya śālivāhana śakavarṣa 1455 vartamāna Āṁ
girasaṁvatsarada vāradalū śrīmatu vijayana
gariya siṁhāsanadali kruṣṇarāya mahārāyaru rājya
va nāḷuva kāladalu tiṁmma daṁṇāyakaru Ā voḍeye
ra nirūpadiṁda maṁgalūra bārakūra rājyavaratnappa voḍe
yaru Āḷuvāga tirumalarāya cauṭaru dēvaroḍeya
rāda kuṁdaheggaḍeyarū voppi tirumalarasara ka
ranika hegaḍeyarige Avarukoṭṭakālu
śilāśāsanada kramaveṁteṁdare hattira
doregaḷa saṁtāna saṁ
tāna paraṁpareyāgi Ācaṁdrākka pariyaṁttara
Arasu koṭṭa
yi mūṟujana silāga Ayakaḷa
nimage Arasu A rigaḷiṁda bhayararasariṁ
da kāḷagabaṁdare naṁmanaṁma makka ttāya naṁ
ma kaiṁda vecisi vodagi kādi niluvare tappi nāvara
bhayararasa koḍikoṁḍu baṁdu niṁma sīmeyamēlekā
da salladu �yo mūṟu sthānadoḷage manuṣya dōṣadiṁda voḷa
tāda baṁdare mātanāḍi nōḍikoḷuhadalli ṁdā taletuḍarikāda
salladu yi yarththakke tappidare sōmanātha liṁgava kitta dō
ṣa viśvanātha liṁgava kittadōṣa gōkarṁnadiṁda kanyā
tīrtha pariyaṁtradaluḷa dēvasthānagaḷa liṁgavakitta dōṣa
vāraṇāsiyali sāvirakavileya koṁdadōṣa
veṁdu barasi hākista śilāśāsanakke śubhamastu śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 27.161 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
